Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "SELECT id, title, substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for 300\) as sample FROM \\"Episode\\" WHERE \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%charente%' OR \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%marseille%' OR \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%lyon%' LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "SELECT count\(*\) as total_locations, count\(DISTINCT \\"episodeId\\"\) as episodes_with_locs, avg\(locs_per_ep\) as avg_locs FROM \(SELECT \\"episodeId\\", count\(*\) as locs_per_ep FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\" GROUP BY \\"episodeId\\"\) sub;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "SELECT e.title, count\(el.*\) as locs FROM \\"Episode\\" e JOIN \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el ON el.\\"episodeId\\" = e.id GROUP BY e.id ORDER BY locs DESC LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -t -A -c "
SELECT id, title FROM \\"Episode\\" 
WHERE \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%calédonie%' 
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%brésil%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%états-unis%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%french connection%'
   OR title ILIKE '%french connection%'
   OR title ILIKE '%calédonie%'
   OR title ILIKE '%caledonie%';" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -t -A -c "
SELECT e.id, e.title, count\(el.id\) as locs
FROM \\"Episode\\" e 
LEFT JOIN \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el ON el.\\"episodeId\\" = e.id
WHERE e.id IN \(56, 160, 176, 48, 208, 20, 167, 232, 234, 299\)
GROUP BY e.id, e.title
ORDER BY e.id;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT 
  count\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE \\"wikiSummary\\" IS NOT NULL AND length\(\\"wikiSummary\\"\) > 200\) as rich_text,
  count\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE \\"wikiSummary\\" IS NULL OR length\(\\"wikiSummary\\"\) < 200\) as poor_text,
  count\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE id NOT IN \(SELECT DISTINCT \\"episodeId\\" FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\"\)\) as no_locations
FROM \\"Episode\\";" 2>&1)

WHERE e.id IN \(19, 93\)
ORDER BY e.id, el.id;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT e.id, e.title, el.\\"communeName\\", el.\\"departmentName\\", el.\\"eventDescription\\"
FROM \\"Episode\\" e JOIN \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el ON el.\\"episodeId\\" = e.id
WHERE e.title ILIKE '%courjault%' OR e.title ILIKE '%heaulme%'
ORDER BY e.title, el.id;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
DELETE FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\" 
WHERE \\"episodeId\\" = 26 AND \\"communeName\\" = 'Port-Gentil';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT e.title, count\(el.id\) as locs, string_agg\(el.\\"communeName\\" || ': ' || coalesce\(el.\\"eventDescription\\", '?'\), ' | ' ORDER BY el.id\) as details
FROM \\"Episode\\" e JOIN \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el ON el.\\"episodeId\\" = e.id
WHERE e.id IN \(
  19,  -- Besse \(8 locs, should be good\)
  93,  -- Mesrine
  20,  -- Dutroux
  45,  -- Emile Louis
  100, -- Fourniret
  33,  -- Guy Georges
  62,  -- Kelkal
  56,  -- French Connection
  261, -- Merah
  207  -- Alègre
\)
GROUP BY e.id, e.title
ORDER BY e.id;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT 
  \(SELECT count\(DISTINCT \\"episodeId\\"\) FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\"\) as episodes_with_locs,
  \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\"\) as total_locations,
  \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM \\"Episode\\" WHERE id NOT IN \(SELECT DISTINCT \\"episodeId\\" FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\"\)\) as still_missing;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT e.title, count\(el.id\) as pins
FROM \\"Episode\\" e JOIN \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el ON el.\\"episodeId\\" = e.id
WHERE e.title ILIKE '%mesrine%' OR e.title ILIKE '%besse%' OR e.title ILIKE '%jourdain%' OR e.title ILIKE '%charron%' OR e.title ILIKE '%tallineau%' OR e.title ILIKE '%heaulme%' OR e.title ILIKE '%fourniret%'
GROUP BY e.id, e.title ORDER BY e.title;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT e.title, count\(el.id\) as pins
FROM \\"Episode\\" e JOIN \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el ON el.\\"episodeId\\" = e.id
WHERE e.id IN \(93, 100, 26, 19, 55, 62, 33, 31, 36, 46, 88, 94, 188\)
GROUP BY e.id, e.title ORDER BY e.title;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT el.\\"communeName\\", el.\\"departmentName\\", el.\\"eventDescription\\"
FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el WHERE el.\\"episodeId\\" = 93 ORDER BY el.id;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT e.title, count\(el.id\) as pins
